name: Water into Wine
oracleText: Create two Treasure tokens. You gain 3 life. Draw a card.
flavorText: "Thou hast kept the good wine until now." — John 2:10
notes: Created from a checked Messianic Fulfillment card list item; first-pass mechanics were added. Source boundary is anchored to Luke with Matthew, Mark, and John as support material per the Biblical-series timeline guide. Classics theme art uses Denys Calvaert's "The Wedding at Cana" via Wikimedia Commons.

classics.license: Public domain; Wikimedia Commons hosts a faithful reproduction of a public-domain work.
classics.creditText: Denys Calvaert, The Wedding at Cana
classics.sourceNotes: A classic Wedding at Cana painting cleanly matches the miracle card.
